overview: Andhra Engineering College (AEC), Atmakur, presents itself on the official site as a private engineering institution focused on academic excellence, research, innovation, and holistic student development in Nellore district. The college highlights modern teaching infrastructure, expert faculty, and a career-oriented engineering environment for AP EAPCET students.
accreditation: AICTE approved; affiliated to JNTUA; NAAC accredited.

coursesAndFees.program: B.Tech - Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning

placements.placementRate: 95% placement record stated on the official site

admissions.admissionProcess: The official site advertises B.Tech admissions under EAMCET code AECN and also indicates management/NRI pathways through the institutional admissions process.
admissions.importantDates: Admissions for 2026-27 are shown as open on the official site, while AP EAPCET and ECET schedules are announced separately by APSCHE.

campus.specialNote: The official site emphasizes industry-readiness, holistic development, and a modern campus experience for engineering students.
